tools.description: Infrastructure Dependency Assessment is for documenting how critical assets rely on power, communications, suppliers, and related systems, and for capturing continuity and consequence in a structured assessment you can carry through review.

Hotel Analysis is the Hotel Operational Security Toolkit (HOST): a guided assessment for lodging and hospitality properties—facility profile, parking, guest services, surveillance, access control, perimeter, and related operational security so you can cover the property end to end.
SAFE 3.0 (ALT SAFE) is a comprehensive security assessment for facilities and environments—structured sections, scoring, and reporting in one self-contained web application.
Modular Site Assessment is a modular assessment designed so Protective Security Advisors have a flexible tool to conduct assessments based on sector and subsector.
